subjects.description: A couple of translucent white stray polythene plastic bags on the damp concrete deck, soft and ghostly pale in the fog, lightly crumpled and partially lifted by the cold breeze
subjects.appearance_details: Thin, semi-transparent plastic looking soft, dim, and ghostly in the sea fog, edges barely defined and creased, half-dissolved into the grey mist, damp and cold
subjects.relationship: Loose debris on the road ahead of the moving ego vehicle, harmless obstacles being ignored
subjects.location: center foreground to lower-center of frame, on the road ahead
subjects.orientation: Tumbling and shifting, no fixed orientation
subjects.pose: Crumpled and partially lifted, drifting along the asphalt
subjects.action: Being tossed and skittered across the road by gusts of wind
subjects.state_changes: Bags shift position, lift briefly, and tumble as the vehicle approaches and passes near them

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, implied by the first-person dashboard-level point of view, traveling forward along a fog-shrouded bridge deck
subjects.appearance_details: Front hood edge faintly visible at the bottom of the frame, windshield framing the view of the road ahead
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle whose perspective the entire video is shot from
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible lower frame
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road, aligned with the camera
subjects.pose: Driving steadily forward in its lane
subjects.action: Maintaining consistent speed and lane position
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; continues straight at constant speed

background_setting: A long bridge deck over water at dawn wrapped in sea fog, the damp concrete roadway stretching into cool grey mist that hides the far span and towers. Guardrails and lampposts loom faintly out of the fog on both sides; the water below is invisible beneath the haze. A pale, diffuse winter dawn glow suffuses the mist as gulls call unseen, the road surface damp and cold underfoot.

lighting.conditions: Dawn in dense sea fog, dim and diffuse
lighting.direction: Cool, sourceless dawn glow scattered evenly through the fog
lighting.shadows: No distinct shadows; the fog diffuses the faint dawn light uniformly
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool dim grey-blue glow with heavy haze; the two translucent bags look soft, pale, and ghostly in the fog, half-dissolved into the mist as they drift over the damp concrete deck

aesthetics.composition: First-person driving perspective with the bridge deck fading into fog near center, hood edge anchoring the bottom, the two faint bags in the central foreground
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool grey-blues of sea fog and dim dawn, damp pale concrete, faint dark guardrails, and ghostly pale bags
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Cold, still, ghostly foggy dawn crossing
aesthetics.patterns: Receding guardrails and lampposts fading into fog along the deck

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle, steady and smooth
cinematography.framing: Wide shot capturing the road ahead
cinematography.depth_of_field: Shallow, the deck dissolving quickly into fog
cinematography.focus: The near concrete deck and the two ghostly bags in the central foreground; the sea fog blurs everything beyond

context: Autonomous driving or dashcam scenario demonstrating a vehicle ignoring harmless road debris

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives forward steadily along the fog-shrouded bridge deck; two stray polythene bags emerge faintly ahead from the sea fog, ghostly pale as they flutter.
The vehicle continues at constant speed; the bags tumble and skitter across the damp concrete as the gap closes in the fog.
The vehicle maintains its lane and speed, passing near the bags without deviation as they drift back into the mist.

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives forward on the fog-shrouded bridge deck at dim dawn; two ghostly polythene bags emerge faintly ahead from the sea fog.
segments.key_changes: Bags appear dimly in the central foreground and begin to flutter.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking from dashboard view.

segments.description: The vehicle holds speed and lane as the bags tumble across the damp concrete deck in the fog.
segments.key_changes: Bags shift and lift, soft against the mist.

segments.description: The vehicle maintains its course and passes near the bags, ignoring them entirely as they drift aside into the fog.
segments.key_changes: Bags fade out of central frame; the misty deck ahead stays clear.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle moves steadily forward along a long bridge deck at dawn wrapped in sea fog, damp concrete fading into cool grey mist that hides the far span. Within the first two seconds, two translucent polythene bags emerge faintly in the central foreground, soft and ghostly pale in the fog as they lift and flutter. From 0:02 to 0:03 the vehicle holds constant speed and lane position as the bags tumble and skitter across the damp deck. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle continues without deviation, passing near the bags and ignoring them as they drift back into the mist, the deck ahead remaining faintly visible through the sea fog.
audio_description: Ambient foggy dawn bridge sounds: the muffled hum of the engine and tires on damp concrete, deadened by the fog, the low wash of unseen water and gulls calling in the mist. No speech or music; the soft muted rustle of plastic bags in the cold breeze.
